description:
A key client, 'Meridian Technologies Inc', has relocated their headquarters. Update the existing account in SuiteCRM with the following details:

- Billing Address Street: 4200 Commerce Court, Suite 310
- Billing Address City: Raleigh
- Billing Address State: NC
- Billing Address Postal Code: 27601
- Phone Office: (919) 555-0142
- Industry: Technology
- Description: Relocated from Austin TX office effective January 2025. Primary contact remains David Chen.

Ensure you modify the existing record rather than creating a new one.
